contentPattern.structure: icon above a short bold text point, arranged in a centered row/grid (no description paragraph)

suitableFor: 'why choose us' stat/point rows: icon above a short bold statement (e.g. '25+ year Adobe partnership')
4-up value-point rows with a large icon and a single line of emphasized text
icon-led proof points without descriptive paragraphs
notSuitableFor: small icon + one-word platform labels (use cards-tech-stack)
